description: The ENHANCE clinical trial results released in 2008 indicated that the popular cholesterol-lowering drug Vytorin provided no added benefit over cheaper statins, despite significantly higher marketing efforts. This triggered congressional inquiries and a sharp drop in public trust regarding pharmaceutical marketing vs. efficacy.

key_events.description: ENHANCE study results presented at the American College of Cardiology.
US House Committee on Energy and Commerce launches investigation into drug marketing.
Merck and Schering-Plough reach massive class-action lawsuit settlement.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling public reaction to discrepancies between aggressive pharmaceutical marketing and clinical study outcomes.
